name: mimo-ota-test-system
description: MIMO OTA Test System - Multi-service development environment

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "ChannelEngine,API,GUI" -c "blue,yellow,green" "npm run dev:channel-engine" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:gui"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd gui && npm install
scripts.setup:channel-engine: cd channel-engine-service && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:api: cd api-service && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:channel-engine && npm run setup:api && npm run install:all

author: Meta-3D Team
